raw_consumer_statement: I booked a trip with my barclay credit card with XXXX XXXXXXXX in XXXX. Trip was for XX/XX/XXXX with my family. My dad was rushed to the hospital on XX/XX/XXXX and put into XXXX. He had a XXXX XXXX and the doctors ALL advised us to cancel any trips we had booked. So we did. I provided them with a doctors note. I understand that there are terms and conditions but unfortunately this was not something we were expecting to go thru. I contacted XXXX and opened a dispute and they refused to credit back my card. I spoke to agent as of this morning XX/XX/XXXX and was told their is NOTHING they can do as a credit card company. I know that credit card companies can make a 1 time exception for the customer. They never offered. I sent in all documents to re open my case on XX/XX/XXXX like I was told to by an agent when I called in. This is truly disturbing the lengths I have to go thru for something that was not in my control and even more so on how serious it was.
